//: Make local-development manifest. Reconciled with the remote app when linked via the Make Apps VS Code extension ('Local development for Apps'). 'origins' is filled in then.

openSession.label: Open Browser Session
openSession.description: Start a new cloud browser session on TestMu AI Browser Cloud. ALWAYS call this first in a browsing task. Returns a sessionId that every other browser tool requires — keep it and pass the same value to each subsequent call.

navigate.label: Navigate
navigate.description: Open a URL in the cloud browser and return a fresh numbered snapshot of the page's interactive elements. Requires the sessionId from Open Browser Session.

snapshot.label: Snapshot Page
snapshot.description: Return a fresh numbered list of the interactive elements (links, buttons, inputs) on the current page. Use these ref numbers to click or type. Requires sessionId.

click.label: Click Element
click.description: Click an element by its ref number from the most recent snapshot. Returns an updated snapshot of the resulting page. Requires sessionId.

type.label: Type Text
type.description: Type text into an input element by its ref number from the most recent snapshot, optionally pressing Enter to submit. Returns an updated snapshot. Requires sessionId.

getText.label: Get Text
getText.description: Read visible text from the page — the whole page (ref 0 or empty) or a single element by ref. Use this to extract content. Requires sessionId.

screenshot.label: Screenshot
screenshot.description: Capture a PNG screenshot (base64) of the current viewport, useful for vision models. Requires sessionId.

release.label: Release Session
release.description: End the cloud browser session to free resources and stop billing. ALWAYS call this when the task is complete. Requires sessionId.
